tool_args.label: Off-board fare collection for 34th Street Transitway
tool_args.raw_text: There will likely be 3 fare machines at every stop, and boarding on/off all three doors on the bus. There are inspectors to check for proof of payment. Fare collection improvements will likely go in ahead of the Transitway, in 2011

payload.description: Three fare machines at every stop; all-door boarding; proof-of-payment inspection

tool_args.label: 34th Street Transitway CAC Meeting #1
tool_args.raw_text: Tuesday, June 15, 2010, 6pm-8pm, Hotel Pennsylvania, 330 Seventh Ave, New York, NY

payload.event_name: 34th Street Transitway Community Advisory Committee Meeting #1
payload.description: First CAC meeting for the 34th Street Transitway; included introductions, presentation, and Q&A

tool_args.label: Fare collection improvements ahead of Transitway
tool_args.raw_text: Fare collection improvements will likely go in ahead of the Transitway, in 2011

payload.description: Fare collection improvements ahead of the Transitway

tool_args.label: Traffic analysis review with CAC
tool_args.raw_text: We will meet with the CAC to review this in late 2010/early 2011

payload.description: CAC review of traffic analysis results

tool_args.label: Up to 8,000 pedestrians per hour on 34th St near 7th Ave
tool_args.raw_text: There have been counts recorded of up to 8,000 pedestrian per hour on 34th St near 7th Ave. That number increases during the holiday season.

payload.claim_text: There have been counts recorded of up to 8,000 pedestrian per hour on 34th St near 7th Ave. That number increases during the holiday season.

tool_args.label: Ridership increased after current lanes were painted
tool_args.raw_text: Q: Has ridership improved after the current lanes were painted? A: Yes, ridership has increased, and NYCT will be adding service on the corridor.

payload.claim_text: Ridership has increased after the current lanes were painted, and NYCT will be adding service on the corridor.

tool_args.label: Current planning funded by CMAQ grant
tool_args.raw_text: Current planning work for the Transitway is being funded by the Congestion Mitigation/Air Quality (CMAQ) grant from the federal government.

payload.claim_text: Current planning work for the Transitway is being funded by the Congestion Mitigation/Air Quality (CMAQ) grant from the federal government.

tool_args.label: ARC project design fixed, no connection to Penn Station
tool_args.raw_text: The ARC project design is more or less fixed, and the Transitway will work to accommodate pedestrian flow from that project. Bill Redl of STV, who has also worked on the ARC project, pointed out that the ARC tunnels needed to be very deep for engineering reasons, and so a connection to Penn Station was not possible.

payload.claim_text: The ARC project design is more or less fixed, and the Transitway will work to accommodate pedestrian flow from that project. Bill Redl of STV, who has also worked on the ARC project, pointed out that the ARC tunnels needed to be very deep for engineering reasons, and so a connection to Penn Station was not possible.

tool_args.label: Up to 8,000 pedestrians per hour on 34th St near 7th Ave
tool_args.raw_text: There have been counts recorded of up to 8,000 pedestrian per hour on 34th St near 7th Ave. That number increases during the holiday season.

issues: metric_claim payload with raw_value_text should include normalized numeric value or value_min/value_max

tool_args.label: Up to 8,000 pedestrians per hour on 34th St near 7th Ave
tool_args.raw_text: There have been counts recorded of up to 8,000 pedestrian per hour on 34th St near 7th Ave. That number increases during the holiday season.

tool_args.label: FTA had not identified level of environmental review
tool_args.raw_text: The FTA has not identified the level of environmental review required for this project, so it may not exactly be an 'EIS.'

payload.missing_information: Level of environmental review required for the 34th Street Transitway project
payload.description: FTA had not identified the level of environmental review at the time of the June 2010 CAC meeting

tool_args.label: Federal construction grants not yet approved
tool_args.raw_text: DOT has applied for additional federal grants for construction; if these grants are not approved, the project will apply for additional grants.

payload.missing_information: Approval status of federal construction grants
payload.description: DOT applied for additional federal grants for construction; approval status unknown at time of meeting
